title: cyclamen hederifolium var. poli
intro: Cyclamen hederifolium var. poli, also known as ivy-leaved cyclamen, is a variety of perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its heart-shaped, ivy-like leaves and vibrant pink flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The roots of the cyclamen hederifolium var. poli plant are said to have anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary tract issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to relieve symptoms of PMS, anxiety, and insomnia.
